zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Swinburne於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Richard Swinburn27歲，母親Hodierno23歲。他於1232年與Avicia de Umfreville在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1301年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德勒頓享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德勒頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Swinburne于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Richard Swinburn27岁，母亲Hodierno23岁。他于1232年与Avicia de Umfreville在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1301年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德勒頓享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德勒頓。

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Swinburne was born about 1210, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Swinburn, was 27 and his mother, Hodierno, was 23. He married Avicia de Umfreville in 1232, in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died about 1301, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93, and was buried in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Swinburne est né environ 1210, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Swinburn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Hodierno, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Avicia de Umfreville en 1232, à Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé environ 1301, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Swinburne um 1210 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Swinburn 27 und seine Mutter Hodierno 23. Er hat 1232 in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Avicia de Umfreville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb um 1301 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Swinburne è nato il circa 1210 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Swinburn, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Hodierno, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Avicia de Umfreville nel 1232, nel Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì circa 1301, nel Chollerton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Chollerton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Swinburneが約1210年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Richard Swinburnは27歳，母Hodiernoは23歳であった。1232年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクウエルパントンでAvicia de Umfrevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は約1301年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Swinburne(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Swinburn(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Hodierno(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커크화핀그턴에서 Avicia de Umfreville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Swinburne nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Swinburn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Hodierno, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Avicia de Umfreville em 1232, em Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1301, em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Swinburne родился около 1210 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Swinburn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Hodierno, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Avicia de Umfreville в 1232 г. в местности киркуелпингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер около 1301 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1210–Abt 1301: e tusa o le 1210–e tusa o le 1301

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Swinburne nació aproximadamente 1210, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Swinburn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Hodierno, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Avicia de Umfreville en 1232, en Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1301, en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
